name: census-mcp-server
description: Query U.S. Census Bureau data, variables, and geography via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

CENSUS_API_KEY.title: Census API Key
CENSUS_API_KEY.description: Census Bureau API key from api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html. Required for data queries (census_query_data, census_compare_geographies); variable search and geography resolution work without it.
